steps.title: Evaluate the function at x = 2
steps.content:
Substitute $$x = 2$$ into the given equation: $$y = 0.5(2)^{2} - 6(2) + 101 = 2 - 12 + 101 = 91.$$
Thus the point $$(2,91)$$ lies on the graph.

steps.title: Interpret the point in context
steps.content:
In the model, $$x$$ represents days after the IPO and $$y$$ is the estimated stock price in dollars. Therefore $$(x,y) = (2,91)$$ means that 2 days after going public, the estimated stock price is \$91.
That is the correct answer.
